## Constitution Alignment

- [ ] CHK001 Redirect path independence is preserved or marked not applicable
- [ ] CHK002 Shortener API owns URL creation, management, and quota enforcement
  while Redirect Service owns public `GET /{shortCode}`
- [ ] CHK003 Cassandra/Redis modeling choices are documented or marked not applicable
- [ ] CHK004 Analytics remains asynchronous, aggregate-based, and backed by a
  documented ClickEvent schema
- [ ] CHK005 Statistics.BatchProcessor.Worker scheduling strategy is documented
  or marked not applicable
- [ ] CHK006 Runtime components are separate APIs, consumers, or batch processors
  and are not collapsed into one service
- [ ] CHK007 Angular frontend work is located under `src/Front/`, uses only
  ApiGateway, and does not access ClickHouse, MinIO/S3, Cassandra, or Redis
  directly

## Operational Readiness

- [ ] CHK008 Structured logs, metrics, traces, and correlation IDs are covered
- [ ] CHK009 Docker Compose, health checks, and `.env.example` impacts are covered
- [ ] CHK010 Required backend, Angular, e2e, load, and documentation updates are covered

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
